hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs balance strict data minimization with audit-ready evidence preservation through role-based access, secure retention, and traceable compliance governance workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Data retention creates operational and audit challenges
problem_description: Maintaining compliance requires preserving sufficient evidence while managing the volume and sensitivity of retained data. Without clear data minimization and retention controls, compliance teams face risks of over-retention, weak auditability and governance gaps.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY preserves required audit evidence while applying configurable retention and access controls to reduce data volume and support governance for institutional compliance teams at VASPs.
workflow_title: From data retention to controlled evidence
workflow_description: SFTY manages compliance data by preserving required evidence while applying retention policies and access controls for clear audit and institutional readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another storage silo. Controlled data retention
why_sfty_description: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence with data minimization and role-based access, connecting required compliance records without creating redundant or isolated data stores.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports regulated VASPs balancing data minimization with audit-ready evidence and secure workflows designed for bank due diligence and enterprise deployment control.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support data minimization with audit-ready evidence
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance workflows preserve evidence with minimal data
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how role-based access controls secure sensitive compliance records
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY supports data retention aligned with enterprise trust
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY support data minimization?
faq_1_answer: SFTY supports data minimization by enabling configurable data retention policies that limit stored information while preserving necessary compliance evidence and audit logs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_2_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence by securely recording decision logs, case history and provider outputs to support traceability and review readiness without redundant data.
faq_3_question: How is access governance handled in SFTY?
faq_3_answer: SFTY employs role-based access control and detailed audit logs to govern data visibility and user actions, supporting compliance with institutional security requirements.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY can connect and orchestrate multiple existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into a connected compliance workflow without disruption.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a compliance control layer above providers, integrating their outputs into structured workflows rather than replacing underlying compliance or supervisory tools.
final_title: Balance data minimization with audit-ready retention
final_description: Review how SFTY supports role-based access, secure retention and traceable evidence for institutional compliance governance.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
